name: kitten
description: kittens-crew — a deterministic control plane for Claude Code. A Rust binary (`kittenscrew`) owns spec/plan/eval bookkeeping so the model spends its reasoning on judgement, not housekeeping. One authoritative spec store (`.kittenscrew/spec.toml`, projected to SPEC.md), a worth-ranked DAG planner, deterministic quality gates (structured-diff §V validation, fake-delivery scan, value-variance, conformance score), and an 8-event hook membrane: every Claude Code event routes through `kittenscrew hook`, injecting targeted context (plan next + referenced task + suggested kitty role) and — opt-in, hard-bounded — driving the plan forward autonomously. Compression policy keeps structured output (JSON, errors, diffs) on a lossless floor while squeez compresses prose. Commands are thin routers to the binary; the kitties speak from the program. v2 — the drive wheel.
